Trim(s) return (s or \"\"):match(\"^%s*(.-)%s*$\") end\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStart()","slotKey":"-5"},"key":"0"},{"code":"--unit.onStart()\nlocal VERSION  = \"v1.1.0\"\nOrgChannel     = \"NavOrg\"  -- fallback only; real value is read from databank (set by Admin PB)\nWaypointList   = {}\nSendQueue      = {}\nSendIndex      = 1\nSending        = false\nRequestCount   = 0\nLastRequester  = \"---\"\n\nfunction LoadData()\n  if not databank then WaypointList={} return end\n  local raw = databank.getStringValue(\"waypoints\")\n  WaypointList = (raw~=nil and raw~=\"\") and json.decode(raw) or {}\n  -- Channel is controlled exclusively by the Admin PB via the shared databank\n  local ch = databank.getStringValue(\"org_channel\")\n  if ch~=nil and ch~=\"\" then OrgChannel=ch end\nend\n\n-- Reload from databank before each send so we always serve the latest data\nfunction StartSend(requester)\n  LoadData()\n  SendQueue    = {}\n  for _,wp in ipairs(WaypointList) do table.insert(SendQueue, wp) end\n  SendIndex    = 1\n  Sending      = true\n  RequestCount = RequestCount + 1\n  LastRequester = requester\n  emitter.send(OrgChannel, \"<SyncCount>\"..#SendQueue)\n  unit.setTimer(\"send_tick\", 0.3)\n  system.print(\"[ORG-SYNC] Serving \"..#SendQueue..\" WPs to: \"..requester)\n  DrawScreen()\nend\n\n-- ── Screen ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nfunction DrawScreen()\n  if not screen then return end\n  screen.setRenderScript(BuildScreenScript())\nend\n\nfunction BuildScreenScript()\n  local S = {}\n  S[1] = string.format([[\nlocal Channel=%q\nlocal WPCount=%d\nlocal ReqCount=%d\nlocal LastReq=%q\nlocal IsSending=%s\nlocal VERSION=%q\n]],\n    OrgChannel, #WaypointList, RequestCount,\n    LastRequester, tostring(Sending), VERSION)\n\n  S[2] = [[\nlocal Lbg =createLayer()\nlocal Lpnl=createLayer()\nlocal Lln =createLayer()\nlocal Ltxt=createLayer()\nlocal Ltit=createLayer()\nlocal Lch =createLayer()\nlocal Lst =createLayer()\n\nlocal fBig =loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 36)\nlocal fTit =loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 22)\nlocal fTxt =loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 18)\nlocal fSm  =loadFont(\"Montserrat-Light\", 14)\n\nlocal ScrW,ScrH=1024,576\n\nsetDefaultFillColor(Ltxt,Shape_Text,0.82,0.82,0.82,1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Ltit,Shape_Text,1.0, 0.56,0.0, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lch, Shape_Text,0.0, 0.87,1.0, 1)\nsetDefaultFillColor(Lst, Shape_Text,1.0, 0.78,0.2, 1)\nsetDefaultStrokeColor(Lln,Shape_Line,0.40,0.25,0.05,0.5)\nsetDefaultStrokeWidth(Lln,Shape_Line,1)\n\n-- Background\nsetNextFillColor(Lbg,0.02,0.01,0,1)\naddBox(Lbg,0,0,ScrW,ScrH)\n\n-- Header bar\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl,0.12,0.06,0,1)\nsetNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,0.55,0.35,0.05,0.9)\nsetNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,2)\naddBox(Lpnl,0,0,ScrW,48)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Left,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,\"◄ ORG BASE  [ SYNC ] ►\",12,24)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Right,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,VERSION,ScrW-12,24)\naddLine(Lln,0,48,ScrW,48)\n\n-- Central channel display\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl,0,0.03,0.06,0.85)\nsetNextStrokeColor(Lpnl,0.0,0.50,0.80,0.6)\nsetNextStrokeWidth(Lpnl,1)\naddBoxRounded(Lpnl,60,90,ScrW-120,170,8)\n\nsetNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.55,0.50,0.35,1)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltxt,fTxt,\"SET THIS CHANNEL ON YOUR SHIP OR BASE STATION\",ScrW/2,120)\n\nsetNextTextAlign(Lch,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Lch,fBig,Channel,ScrW/2,195)\n\n-- Divider\naddLine(Lln,60,282,ScrW-60,282)\n\n-- Stats row\nlocal col1=ScrW*0.25\nlocal col2=ScrW*0.75\nlocal rowY=330\n\nsetNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.45,0.40,0.25,1)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltxt,fSm,\"WAYPOINTS AVAILABLE\",col1,rowY-18)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,tostring(WPCount),col1,rowY+16)\n\nsetNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.45,0.40,0.25,1)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltxt,fSm,\"SYNCS SERVED\",col2,rowY-18)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltit,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltit,fTit,tostring(ReqCount),col2,rowY+16)\n\naddLine(Lln,ScrW/2,300,ScrW/2,370)\n\n-- Last requester / sending status\nlocal statusY=430\nif IsSending then\n  setNextTextAlign(Lst,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Lst,fTxt,\"⟳  Syncing to: \"..LastReq,ScrW/2,statusY)\nelse\n  setNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.40,0.35,0.20,1)\n  setNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\n  addText(Ltxt,fSm,\"Last sync: \"..LastReq,ScrW/2,statusY)\nend\n\n-- Footer\naddLine(Lln,0,ScrH-40,ScrW,ScrH-40)\nsetNextFillColor(Lpnl,0.04,0.02,0,0.95)\naddBox(Lpnl,0,ScrH-40,ScrW,40)\nsetNextFillColor(Ltxt,0.40,0.30,0.12,1)\nsetNextTextAlign(Ltxt,AlignH_Center,AlignV_Middle)\naddText(Ltxt,fSm,\"Read-only sync server  |  Channel is managed by the Org Admin PB\",ScrW/2,ScrH-20)\n\nrequestAnimationFrame(1)\n]]\n  return table.concat(S)\nend\n\n-- ── Init ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nLoadData()\nif screen   then screen.activate() end\nif receiver then receiver.setChannelList({OrgChannel}) end\nunit.setTimer(\"heartbeat\", 30)\nsystem.print(\"=== Org Sync PB \"..VERSION..\" ===\")\nsystem.print(\"Channel: \"..OrgChannel..\"  |  WPs: \"..#WaypointList)\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStart()","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"1"},{"code":"--unit.onStop()\nsystem.print(\"[ORG-SYNC] Stopped. Requests served: \"..tostring(RequestCount))\nif screen then screen.setCenteredText(\"Org Sync\") end\n--","filter":{"args":[],"signature":"onStop()","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"2"},{"code":"--unit.onTimer(tag)\nif not Sending then return end\nif SendIndex > #SendQueue then\n  emitter.send(OrgChannel, \"<SyncComplete>\")\n  Sending = false\n  system.print(\"[ORG-SYNC] Send complete (\"..#SendQueue..\" WPs)\")\n  DrawScreen()\n  return\nend\nlocal wp = SendQueue[SendIndex]\nlocal d  = json.encode({n=wp.n, c=wp.c}):gsub('\"', \"@@@\")\nemitter.send(OrgChannel, \"<SyncWP>\"..d)\nSendIndex = SendIndex + 1\n--","filter":{"args":[{"value":"send_tick"}],"signature":"onTimer(tag)","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"3"},{"code":"--unit.onTimer(tag)\nLoadData()\nif receiver then receiver.setChannelList({OrgChannel}) end\nsystem.print(\"[ORG-SYNC] Alive  |  Channel: \"..OrgChannel..\"  |  WPs: \"..#WaypointList..\"  |  Served: \"..RequestCount)\nDrawScreen()\n--","filter":{"args":[{"value":"heartbeat"}],"signature":"onTimer(tag)","slotKey":"-1"},"key":"4"},{"code":"--databank.onReceived(channel,message)\nif message:find(\"<RequestSync>\", 1, true) then\n  local who = message:gsub(\"<RequestSync>\", \"\")\n  StartSend(who)\nend\n-- Ignore everything else — this PB never writes to the databank\n--","filter":{"args":[{"variable":"*"},{"variable":"*"}],"signature":"onReceived(channel,message)","slotKey":"2"},"key":"5"}],"methods":[],"events":[]}
